name: Rabbit with Tarragon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a resealable plastic bag, combine the flour, tarragon, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the rabbit pieces, one at a time, and shake well to coat evenly.
3. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the oil.
4. Sauté the rabbit pieces in batches until browned on all sides.
5. Add the broth; cover and simmer for 50-60 minutes or until tender.
6. Thicken the pan juices if desired by reducing over low heat.
